recommendations.title: Stuck
recommendations.overview: A young woman commits a hit-and-run, then finds her fate tied to her victim.

recommendations.title: Castle Freak
recommendations.overview: John Reilly discovers that his family's newly inherited castle in Italy is haunted by a relentless, bloodthirsty creature.

recommendations.title: Space Truckers
recommendations.overview: John Canyon is one of the last independent space transport entrepreneurs. Rough times force him to carry suspicious cargo to Earth without questions being asked. During the flight the cargo turns out to be a multitude of unstoppable killer robots.

recommendations.title: From Beyond
recommendations.overview: The Resonator, a powerful machine that can control the sixth sense, has killed its creator and sent his associate into an insane asylum. When a psychiatrist becomes determined to continue the experiment, she unwittingly opens the door to a hostile pa

recommendations.title: Re-Animator
recommendations.overview: Conducting clandestine experiments within the morgue at Miskatonic University, scientist Herbert West reveals to a fellow graduate student his groundbreaking work concerning the re-animation of fresh corpses.

recommendations.title: Dreams in the Witch House
recommendations.overview: A college student renting an old room in a boarding house discovers a plot by sinister, otherworldly forces to sacrifice his neighbor's infant.

recommendations.title: Dolls
recommendations.overview: A precocious girl, her nasty parents, two punk-rock losers and a weak-kneed salesman inadvertently become the guests of two ghoulish senior citizens in their dark, haunted mansion.

recommendations.title: Robot Jox
recommendations.overview: 50 years after a nuclear war, the two superpowers handle territorial disputes in a different way. Each fields a giant robot to fight one-on-one battles in official matches, each piloted by a man inside, known as robot jockeys or jox. The contest for

recommendations.title: Edmond
recommendations.overview: Seemingly mild-mannered businessman Edmond Burke visits a fortuneteller and hears a remark that spurs him to leave his wife abruptly and seek what is missing from his life. Encounters with strangers and unsavory people weaken the barriers encompassin

recommendations.title: The Pit and the Pendulum
